movie.actors: Nicolas Cage, Violante Placido, Ciarán Hinds, Idris Elba
movie.plot: As Johnny Blaze hides out in Eastern Europe, he is called upon to stop the devil, who is trying to take human form.
movie.title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance
movie.writer: Scott M. Gimple (screenplay), Seth Hoffman (screenplay), David S. Goyer (screenplay), David S. Goyer (story)
